'''dhogathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ataunt|ataunt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ataunt|ataunt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhogathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhogathithi|dhogathithi]] || [[word:dhogathiji|dhogathiji]] || [[word:dhogathishi|dhogathishi]] || [[word:dhogathiki|dhogathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhogathuthuthu|dhogathuthuthu]] || [[word:dhogathujuju|dhogathujuju]] || [[word:dhogathushushu|dhogathushushu]] || [[word:dhogathukuku|dhogathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhogathuthu|dhogathuthu]] || [[word:dhogathuju|dhogathuju]] || [[word:dhogathushu|dhogathushu]] || [[word:dhogathuku|dhogathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhogathufthuf|dhogathufthuf]] || [[word:dhogathufjuf|dhogathufjuf]] || [[word:dhogathufshuf|dhogathufshuf]] || [[word:dhogathufkuf|dhogathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhogathethe|dhogathethe]] || [[word:dhogatheje|dhogatheje]] || [[word:dhogatheshe|dhogatheshe]] || [[word:dhogatheke|dhogatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhogathothotho|dhogathothotho]] || [[word:dhogathojojo|dhogathojojo]] || [[word:dhogathoshosho|dhogathoshosho]] || [[word:dhogathokoko|dhogathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhogathotho|dhogathotho]] || [[word:dhogathojo|dhogathojo]] || [[word:dhogathosho|dhogathosho]] || [[word:dhogathoko|dhogathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhogathofthof|dhogathofthof]] || [[word:dhogathofjof|dhogathofjof]] || [[word:dhogathofshof|dhogathofshof]] || [[word:dhogathofkof|dhogathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhogathĂŻfthĂŻf|dhogathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhogathĂŻfjĂŻf|dhogathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhogathĂŻfshĂŻf|dhogathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhogathĂŻfkĂŻf|dhogathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhogathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhogathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhogathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhogathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhogathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhogathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhogathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhogathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhogathĂŻfthĂŻf|dhogathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhogathĂŻfjĂŻf|dhogathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhogathĂŻfshĂŻf|dhogathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhogathĂŻfkĂŻf|dhogathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhogathĂŻfthĂŻf|dhogathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhogathĂŻfjĂŻf|dhogathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhogathĂŻfshĂŻf|dhogathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhogathĂŻfkĂŻf|dhogathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhogathĂŠthĂŠ|dhogathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhogathĂŠjĂŠ|dhogathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhogathĂŠshĂŠ|dhogathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhogathĂŠkĂŠ|dhogathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhogathathatha|dhogathathatha]] || [[word:dhogathajaja|dhogathajaja]] || [[word:dhogathashasha|dhogathashasha]] || [[word:dhogathakaka|dhogathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhogathatha|dhogathatha]] || [[word:dhogathaja|dhogathaja]] || [[word:dhogathasha|dhogathasha]] || [[word:dhogathaka|dhogathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhogathafthaf|dhogathafthaf]] || [[word:dhogathafjaf|dhogathafjaf]] || [[word:dhogathafshaf|dhogathafshaf]] || [[word:dhogathafkaf|dhogathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhogathasha|dhogathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhogathshĂ«asha|dhogathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhogathroasha|dhogathroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhogathmuasha|dhogathmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhogathyaasha|dhogathyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhogathnkshĂ«asha|godhogathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhogathnkroasha|godhogathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhogathnkmuasha|godhogathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhogathnkyaasha|godhogathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhogagathasha|dhogagathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhogagathshĂ«asha|dhogagathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhogagathroasha|dhogagathroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhogagathmuasha|dhogagathmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhogagathyaasha|dhogagathyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhogagathnkshĂ«asha|godhogagathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhogagathnkroasha|godhogagathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhogagathnkmuasha|godhogagathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhogagathnkyaasha|godhogagathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhegĂŠthasha|dhegĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhegĂŠthshĂ«asha|dhegĂŠthshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhegĂŠthroasha|dhegĂŠthroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhegĂŠthmuasha|dhegĂŠthmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhegĂŠthyaasha|dhegĂŠthyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhegĂŠthnkshĂ«asha|godhegĂŠthnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhegĂŠthnkroasha|godhegĂŠthnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhegĂŠthnkmuasha|godhegĂŠthnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhegĂŠthnkyaasha|godhegĂŠthnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhogfathasha|dhogfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhogfathshĂ«asha|dhogfathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhogfathroasha|dhogfathroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhogfathmuasha|dhogfathmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhogfathyaasha|dhogfathyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhogfathnkshĂ«asha|godhogfathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhogfathnkroasha|godhogfathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhogfathnkmuasha|godhogfathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhogfathnkyaasha|godhogfathnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
